rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component implementations when binding implementation-level details, and into component types for structural assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Preserve the AADL component hierarchy when embedding annexes; do not alter ownership or scope boundaries.
Ensure annex content respects the enclosing component's scope: type-level for architecture, implementation-level for bindings.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes use the syntax: annex agree {** ... **}; with double asterisks delimiting content.
anti_patterns: Do not inject annexes into parent or unrelated components; maintain strict ownership alignment with the target.
irrelevant_topics: Assumed type vs actual type mismatches
Helper declaration patterns for boolean comparisons
